title: Duplicate Id and UTCDate type aliases in jmap.rs and types.rs
description: Both jmap.rs and types.rs define: pub type Id = String; pub type UTCDate = String; They are identical and in the same crate. A reader has to check whether they are the same type or carry different constraints. Currently types.rs imports nothing from jmap.rs and vice versa, so there is no compiler-enforced link. Rewrite: define Id and UTCDate exactly once in jmap.rs (the foundational RFC 8620 types module) and use them in types.rs as crate::jmap::Id and crate::jmap::UTCDate. This makes the single source of truth explicit and removes the reader's doubt.
close_reason: Fixed: FIXTYPES removed duplicate aliases, re-exports from jmap::
